'''Verpine fiber ultramesh''', also known simply known as '''Ultramesh''', was a type of durable armor made by the [[Verpine/Legends|Verpine]].<ref name="COMPLETE" />

==Characteristics==
Ultramesh was made by tightly weaving proprietary [[Verpine fiber]] into a dense and durable micromesh; despite its denseness, however, ultramesh was still lightweight and flexible, making it ideal for the construction of body armor.<ref name="COMPLETE" />

Ultramesh could be tailored in numerous ways, from full suits of medium [[Armor/Legends|armor]] such as those in the days of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]] (whose durability, at the time, surpassed that of most heavy armor of the era)<ref name="TOR">''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]''</ref>, to lightweight jumpsuits that appeared like normal cloth until an electrical charge was run through it, making it exceptionally rigid on activation.<ref name="STRONGHOLD" />

==History==
The techniques for making ultramesh were a carefully-guarded secret among the Verpine for millennia, as the manufacturing technique could be applied to other materials, making them substantially lighter and more durable; the [[Bes'uliik|Mando-Verpine Assault Fighter]] jointly developed by [[MandalMotors]] and the Verpine of [[Roche Hive Mechanical Apparatus Design and Construction Activity for Those Who Need the Hive's Machines/Legends|Roche Industries]] being one notable example.<ref name="LEGACY">''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]''</ref> Despite this secrecy, the Verpine exported fiber mesh and ultramesh armor for centuries, making it a relatively common sight throughout the galaxy.<ref name="STRONGHOLD" />
